translations.**[2020–10–24 更新]** ：Spotify 已支援獨立播放，在手錶: **[2020–10–24 Update]**: Spotify now supports standalone playback. In the watch Spotify app, select Playback Device -> Apple Watch -> connect Bluetooth headphones -> then you can play! (Offline downloads are still not supported; an internet connection is required).
translations.**watchOS 6：** 加入環境噪音偵測、月經記錄（適合女性朋友）、網路對: **watchOS 6:** Added environmental noise detection, menstrual tracking (for female users), and Walkie-Talkie feature
translations.**watchOS 7：** 加入睡眠追蹤功能、洗手時洗手時間輔助提示、家庭共享: **watchOS 7:** Added sleep tracking, handwashing timer assistance, and Family Sharing features
translations.**大的：** 42 （Apple Watch 3 以下）/ 44 （Apple: **Large:** 42 (Apple Watch 3 and below) / 44 (Apple Watch 4 and above)
translations.**小的：** 38 （Apple Watch 3 以下）/ 40 （Apple: **Small:** 38 (Apple Watch 3 and earlier) / 40 (Apple Watch 4 and later)
translations.**錶帶只區分：**\n\n: **The watch bands are only categorized as:**
translations.*- watchOS 5 之前是超過 65 歲才會預設開啟跌倒偵測、小於 65: *- Before watchOS 5, fall detection was enabled by default only for users over 65 years old; it was off by default for those under 65. You can check this setting.*
translations.*- 緊急聯絡人可指定多位，需事先設定。*\n\n: *- Multiple emergency contacts can be designated and must be set up in advance.*
translations.*Apple Watch 僅能與 iPhone 配對（ **Android 手機: *Apple Watch can only pair with iPhone (**Android phones and iPads are not supported**). Also, consider the current iOS version of your phone: **watchOS 7 requires iOS ≥ 14** (*watchOS 6 => iOS ≥ 13 / watchOS 5 => iOS ≥ 12*).*
translations.*and… 本人是 [iOS APP](http://zhgchg.li){:t: *and… I am an [iOS APP](http://zhgchg.li){:target="_blank"} / [watchOS APP developer](../e85d77b05061/)*
translations.*iPhone 要先升級到相對應的最低 iOS 版本才能配對使用。*\n\n: *iPhone must first be upgraded to the corresponding minimum iOS version to pair and use.*
translations.*另外附上血淚教訓，如果你有貼保護貼一定要買保護殼否則容易碎邊（我因為這樣重貼了: *A painful lesson: if you use a screen protector, you must also get a protective case, or the edges can easily chip (I had to replace three protectors and lost nearly $3000 because of this). Also, make sure to get a good-quality protector that fits well; otherwise, it will be hard to use and just a waste of money.*
translations.*如果你要買鋁合金+保護殼要考慮加上保護殼的大小會不會太大。*\n\n: *If you plan to buy aluminum + a protective case, consider whether the case size will be too bulky.*
translations.*小豪包膜是說建議不要多塞犀牛盾的內框會比較容易擠壓到保護貼，只用外框就好；但我: *Xiaohao Screen Protector suggests not to insert the RhinoShield inner frame, as it may press on the screen protector; using only the outer frame is enough. However, my Series 4 has been fine for two years with this setup, so please decide for yourself.*
translations.*手錶有辦法連到當前網路環境 WiFi 的意思是，手機、手錶曾經連線過此 WiF: *The watch can connect to the current WiFi network means that the phone and watch have connected to this WiFi before, and the system has a record to connect directly.*
translations.*根據 [官網資料](https://support.apple.com/zh-: *According to the [official website](https://support.apple.com/zh-tw/HT211768){:target="_blank"}, this feature is only available on LTE models from Series 4 and later!*
translations.*螢幕會變稍微厚一點點，所以內框可能會有一點浮起（看保護殼的公差），不過卡扣都還: *The screen will be slightly thicker, so the inner frame might lift a bit (depending on the case tolerance), but the clasps still snap in properly.*
translations.- **Large:** 42 (Apple Watch 3 and below:
- **Large:** 42 (Apple Watch 3 and earlier) / 44 (Apple Watch 4 and later)

- **Small:** 38 (Apple Watch 3 and earlier) / 40 (Apple Watch 4 and later)
translations.- The estimated delivery time provided b:
- The estimated delivery time provided by the system is 10/16~10/19 (which may coincide with the Mainland China National Day holiday).

- 10/10 Shipping notification sent, expected to arrive before 10/13

- 10/13 Notification: Delivery date may be slightly delayed due to customs clearance.

- Actually received it on 10/14, but still earlier than the original estimated delivery time!

translations.1. In Xiao Gui's case, even an Apple Wat:
1. In Xiao Gui's case, even an Apple Watch couldn't prevent the accident. Since he fell after showering, it's important to note that Apple Watch is **water-resistant but not steam-proof**. Wearing it while showering often causes damage. Also, because it needs to be charged daily, people usually take it off to charge during shower time, so it’s not worn then.

2. Still just an extension of the iPhone, an experimental Apple product

3. Charge once a day, and always bring a charger when going out

4. There was a gap of two to three weeks without wearing a watch when switching from Series 4 to Series 6, and personally, it didn’t make much difference.
translations.1. The watch can directly unlock the Mac:
1. The watch can directly unlock the Mac computer

2. The watch can find the phone with one click (forces the phone to emit a beeping sound)

3. The watch can be used as a Bluetooth remote shutter button to control the phone's camera for taking photos.
translations.10/10 通知發貨，預估 10/13 前就能拿到\n: 10/10 Shipping notification sent, expected to arrive before 10/13
translations.10/13 通知因海關延誤到貨日期可能稍有延誤\n: 10/13 Notification: Delivery date may be slightly delayed due to customs clearance.

Also, make sure to get a good-quality protector that fits well; otherwise, it will be hard to use and just a waste of money.*

However, my Series 4 has been fine for two years with this setup, so please decide for yourself.*

translations.Apple Watch + 犀牛盾保護殼組\n\n: Apple Watch + RhinoShield Protective Case Set
translations.Apple Watch 6 with 犀牛盾保護殼\n\n: Apple Watch 6 with RhinoShield Protective Case
translations.Apple Watch Series 6 開箱及選購指南＆兩年使用心得體驗彙整\: Apple Watch Series 6 Unboxing and Buying Guide & Two-Year Usage Experience Summary
translations.Apple Watch 作為手機的延伸，定位在手機與人之間的緩衝；我們目前對電子: Apple Watch serves as an extension of the phone, acting as a buffer between the phone and the user; currently, our reliance on electronic devices means facing the phone directly and dealing with a flood of notifications.
translations.GPS or LTE 的考量點除了你會不會有場景會只戴手錶出門，還有最近大家最在: Considerations for GPS or LTE include not only whether you will have scenarios where you only wear the watch outside, but also the much-discussed fall detection feature. **The GPS version requires the phone to be nearby or the watch to be connected to a current WiFi network for emergency alerts** (if these conditions are not met, alerts cannot be sent); the LTE version can operate independently, making it safer. Communication between the phone and watch works similarly: the GPS version or a watch without LTE activated communicates via the phone when it is nearby or when the watch can connect to a current WiFi network.
translations.Google Map 最近重回 Apple Watch ，但沒辦法直接查看路線地: Google Map has recently returned to Apple Watch, but it does not support direct route map viewing, only text navigation prompts.
translations.Nike 版只多 Nike 版專屬錶面，Hermès 版除了有Hermès 版專: The Nike edition only adds exclusive Nike watch faces, while the Hermès edition offers exclusive Hermès watch faces as well as Hermès bands paired with the stainless steel version.
translations.Series 4 可升可不升，畢竟主要只差在隨時顯示螢幕及血氧計，Apple W: Upgrading from Series 4 is optional since the main differences are the always-on display and blood oxygen sensor. The raise-to-wake display on Apple Watch is fast and responsive enough; always-on is better but not essential. The blood oxygen sensor is not medically certified and should be used for reference only.
translations.Series 6 / SE 不附豆腐充電頭。\n\n: Series 6 / SE do not include a power adapter.
translations.[**Apple Watch 原廠不鏽鋼米蘭錶帶開箱**](../c0f99f9: [**Apple Watch Official Stainless Steel Milanese Loop Unboxing**](../c0f99f987d9c/)
[**Apple Watch Official Stainless Steel Milanese Loop Unboxing**](../c0f99f987d9c/)
[**Apple Watch Genuine Stainless Steel Milanese Loop Unboxing**](../c0f99f987d9c/) ：
translations.[智慧家居初體驗 — Apple HomeKit & 小米米家](../c315: [First Smart Home Experience — Apple HomeKit & Xiaomi Mijia](../c3150cdc85dd/)
translations.[看更多 Apple Watch 基礎使用教學、APP 推薦](../a2920: [See more Apple Watch basic tutorials and app recommendations](../a2920e33e73e/)
translations.watchOS 7 的 [家庭共享功能](https://www.apple.c: The [Family Setup feature](https://www.apple.com/tw/newsroom/2020/09/apple-extends-the-apple-watch-experience-to-the-entire-family/){:target="_blank"} in watchOS 7 (allows monitoring of children's activities and elderly health) is **only available on LTE models** because **the watch's data is sent to the organizer's (parent's) phone, not the wearer's phone**.

The [Family Setup feature](https://www.apple.com/tw/newsroom/2020/09/apple-extends-the-apple-watch-experience-to-the-entire-family/){:target="_blank"} in watchOS 7 (allows monitoring children’s activities and seniors’ health) is **only available on Series 4 or later, or the SE model**.
translations.一天一充，出門也都要帶充電器\n: Charge once a day, and always bring a charger when going out
translations.不知道你是否跟我一樣覺得手機的通知很嚇人，即使是震動所發出的聲音也是，有時收到通: I don’t know if you feel the same, but phone notifications can be quite startling. Even the vibration sound can be alarming. Sometimes, my heart skips a beat when I get a notification. Then, I instinctively take out my phone to check it. If it’s important, I handle it; if not, I put the phone away. This cycle repeats every day in my life...
translations.不過運動很看人，會運動的人還是會運動、不會運動的人也不會因為手錶而去運動；他頂多: However, exercise depends on the person. Those who exercise will continue to do so, and those who don't won't start just because of a watch; at most, it adds to the tracking and fun of exercising.
translations.不鏽鋼版本 （感謝同事友情支援）\n\n: Stainless Steel Version (Thanks to a colleague for the kind support)
translations.且蘋果表示保證錶帶尺寸都不會更改（不然誰買 Hermès 版ＸＤ）至少目前 1~: Apple also guarantees that the band sizes will not change (otherwise, who would buy the Hermès edition XD). At least for now, bands from Series 1 to 6 are compatible.
translations.之前寫過一篇文章分享 [自己動手做 Apple Watch APP](../e8: I previously wrote an article sharing my experience of [building an Apple Watch app myself](../e85d77b05061/), based on watchOS 5 development. It was clear that the official features were very limited (still pretty much the same now), so third-party apps have limited room to grow, resulting in very few apps.
translations.但因 [小鬼的新聞](https://tw.appledaily.com/gad: However, due to [the news about Xiao Gui](https://tw.appledaily.com/gadget/20200917/WPQMTKQVPFFUPH6LE3R7SEXYAQ/){:target="_blank"}, I fortunately gave my original Series 4 LTE version to a family member. The LTE version can make emergency calls without needing the phone nearby, making it safer compared to the GPS version.
translations.你可能會說，這些設定不是跟手機一樣？但就體驗來說，手錶的聲音/震動更為輕柔不干擾: You might say these settings are the same as on the phone, but in terms of experience, the watch’s sound/vibration is gentler and less intrusive. Even if you turn off sound/vibration, you can quickly check notifications by raising your wrist.
translations.依然還只是手機的延伸、蘋果實驗性產品\n: Still just an extension of the iPhone, an experimental Apple product
translations.保護殼（約 $400）+ 保護貼建議找水凝貼、果凍貼（約 $800）否則容易遇到: A case (around $400) plus a screen protector is recommended—preferably a hydrogel or jelly film (around $800)—to avoid poor adhesion issues; the total adds about $1500, providing full protection even for the aluminum model.
translations.個人很習慣看手錶的當前天氣狀況、降雨機率，一目瞭然；我用手機看都要點好幾層才能看: I’m used to quickly checking the current weather and rain probability on my watch at a glance; using my phone requires tapping through several layers to find the info I want.
translations.個人的使用習慣是出門配戴，回家就拔下來充電，睡覺不會配戴，所以少了睡眠體驗的部分: My personal habit is to wear it when going out and take it off to charge at home. I don't wear it while sleeping, so I miss out on the sleep tracking feature.
translations.個人覺得非常舒服，尤其是想自己小憩一下時，怕鬧鐘鈴聲或手機鬧鐘震動會打擾到其他同: I personally find it very comfortable, especially when I want to take a short nap and worry that the alarm sound or phone vibration might disturb other colleagues.
translations.倒數計時器跟鬧鐘也是我很愛用的功能，可以快速在手錶上啟動倒數計時器，在配戴手錶的: The timer and alarm are also features I use a lot. You can quickly start the timer on the watch, and when the timer or alarm goes off while wearing the watch, it will notify you through the watch (if the watch is on silent, it will vibrate to alert you).
translations.全透明＆全膠完全貼合，不影響滑動順暢跟顯示。\n\n: Fully transparent & fully adhesive, does not affect smooth sliding or display.
translations.只附磁吸充電線。\n\n: Only includes the magnetic charging cable.
translations.因最近大家很注意這個項目，特別列出來分享個人觸發經驗；有一次坐車上車時左手快速且: Since this feature has gained a lot of attention recently, I’m sharing my personal trigger experience; once, while getting on a bus, I quickly and forcefully kicked the seat with my left hand, which successfully triggered the fall detection. The watch first vibrates rapidly and sounds an alert to check if you are conscious. If you don’t respond within 30 seconds, it will call emergency services and notify your emergency contacts.
translations.在從 Series 4 更換到 Series 6 時中間隔了兩三週都沒戴，個人感: There was a gap of two to three weeks without wearing a watch when switching from Series 4 to Series 6, and personally, it didn’t make much difference.
translations.好處是配戴者不一定要是 iPhone 用戶！\n\n: The advantage is that the wearer does not necessarily have to be an iPhone user!
translations.如同前述，Series 4 與 Series 6 功能、產品定位方面都沒有變；都: As mentioned earlier, the features and positioning of Series 4 and Series 6 have not changed; both serve as extensions of the iPhone, not replacements. There have been no breakthrough features in the past two years, and battery life still requires daily charging.
translations.如果你現在手上的是 Series 3/Series 2/Series 1 建議可: If you currently have a Series 3, Series 2, or Series 1, it is recommended to upgrade, at least to Series 4. Starting from Series 4, the screen is full display (many new watch faces require Series 4 or above), and the processor performance is much better with almost no lag. The upgrade is noticeable.
translations.如果已經有 Series 5，可以再等等下一代，沒有升級的必要。\n\n: If you already have Series 5, you can wait for the next generation as there is no need to upgrade.
translations.實際 10/14 拿到，不過還是比原始預估收貨時間來得早了！\n: Actually received it on 10/14, but still earlier than the original estimated delivery time!
translations.小豪包膜的 HAO 果凍膠滿版玻璃保護貼\n\n: Xiaohao's HAO Full-Coverage Jelly Gel Screen Protector
translations.小鬼的案例其實有 Apple Watch 也無法避免\n因小鬼是洗完澡出浴室時跌: In Xiao Gui's case, even an Apple Watch couldn't prevent the accident. Since he fell after showering, it's important to note that Apple Watch is **water-resistant but not steam-proof**. Wearing it while showering often causes damage. Also, because it needs to be charged daily, people usually take it off to charge during shower time, so it’s not worn then.
translations.性能上都很足夠再撐個3~5年都還行，有預算當然買新不買舊，追求 CP 值可以購買: The performance is sufficient to last another 3 to 5 years. If you have the budget, it's better to buy new rather than old. For better cost-performance, you can choose the SE. If your budget is limited, buying a second-hand Series 4/5/LTE version is easier to get.
translations.我 Series 4 買的是 LTE 版，但由於手機都會帶在身邊實在沒必要每個月: I bought the LTE version of Series 4, but since I always carry my phone with me, there's no need to pay an extra $199 monthly fee. Also, replying to messages on the watch is inconvenient, and answering calls requires AirPods to be practical. Additionally, Spotify on the watch only serves as a playback controller and cannot play independently without the iPhone (only Apple Music/KKBOX support standalone playback).
translations.我個人最常見的使用習慣是用手機 widget 讓店員掃載具或是會員條碼（如 7–: My most common usage habit is using the phone widget to let store clerks scan the carrier or membership barcode (like 7–11/FamilyMart, since they don't offer Apple Watch apps), then quickly double-clicking the watch to bring up Apple Pay and making the payment with the same hand.
translations.我想會看到這邊的朋友，80% 都已經想買了；我覺得如果是科技愛好者值得買來玩玩、: I believe 80% of the readers reaching this point are already considering buying it; I think it's worth buying for tech enthusiasts to try out. If a watch is just an accessory for you, you can get a more stylish one at the same price. If you're buying solely for sports, there are better sports watches to consider. Apple Watch is designed for comprehensive needs and enhanced experience.
translations.手機都不用拿出來手錶按兩下就能感應付款，非常方便；尤其在已經大包小包的時候，沒有: You don't need to take out your phone; just double-click the watch to make a payment, which is very convenient—especially when your hands are full and you can't reach into your pocket for your phone. You can also install invoice apps that support Apple Watch, open the app to display the carrier barcode for the cashier to scan, and then double-click to activate Apple Pay for payment.
translations.手錶可一鍵查找手機（強迫手機發出嘟嘟聲）\n: The watch can find the phone with one click (forces the phone to emit a beeping sound)
translations.手錶可當藍芽自拍按鈕，控制手機鏡頭拍照\n: The watch can be used as a Bluetooth remote shutter button to control the phone's camera for taking photos.
translations.手錶可直接解鎖 Mac 電腦\n: The watch can directly unlock the Mac computer
translations.挺好的現在開始螢幕不會熄滅，不用抬腕等螢幕亮查看消息！\n\n: It's great that the screen no longer turns off, so you don't need to raise your wrist to wake it and check messages!
translations.整理一下這兩年的使用感覺和我自己的選購指南。\n\n: Summarize my feelings after two years of use and my personal buying guide.
translations.日常體驗的提升在及增加專注力的方式就是在手錶上快速 Review 通知訊息，然後: The daily experience is improved by quickly reviewing notifications on the watch, then deciding whether to continue the current task or take out the phone to handle the message. The interruption time is very short (just the time spent looking at the watch), which also prevents frequent phone use that can cause distractions, thus increasing work efficiency.
translations.時光飛逝，距離 [上一篇開箱 Apple Watch Series 4 的文章]: Time flies, and it has been two years since the [previous Apple Watch Series 4 unboxing article](../a2920e33e73e/). In terms of features, the Series 4 is more than sufficient with no need to upgrade. The Series 5 and Series 6 have no major breakthrough features; their updates are improvements but not essential.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.有看過 [前一篇開箱](../a2920e33e73e/) 的朋友，那篇文章除了: If you've read the [previous unboxing](../a2920e33e73e/), that article included unboxing, usage tutorials, and some app recommendations. Honestly, I later deleted most of them, keeping only the built-in apps and a few commonly used communication apps. At first, I installed many apps out of curiosity, but I stopped using most of them later.
translations.沒有跟到第一批購買，我 **9/15 晚上下單：**\n\n: Missed the first batch purchase, I **placed the order on the evening of 9/15:**
translations.玩一下這代的主打功能。\n\n: Try out the main features of this generation.
translations.目前已更新到 watchOS 7，同 iOS 一年一更。\n\n: Currently updated to watchOS 7, with iOS updated once a year.
translations.直接進入本文重頭戲。\n\n: Let's get straight to the main part of this article.
translations.看你怎麼定位這隻錶，如果是新奇好玩買鋁合金就好；如果要加強飾品配件屬性則買不鏽鋼: It depends on how you view this watch. If you buy it for novelty and fun, the aluminum version is enough; if you want it as a fashion accessory, go for the stainless steel or higher versions—they look better and match more styles.
translations.看你手的粗細，男生一般建議戴 44，太小有點怪。\n\n: Depending on the thickness of your wrist, men are generally advised to wear the 44mm size; anything smaller might look a bit odd.
translations.第三方 APP 方面兩年來沒新增多少，但有越來越多的趨勢；Line、Goolge: Regarding third-party apps, there haven't been many new additions over the past two years, but there is a growing trend; Line and Google Maps have recently updated and improved their Apple Watch apps, showing they are not forgotten.
translations.系統給的預估收到時間 10/16~10/19（可能剛好遇到大陸國慶長假）\n: The estimated delivery time provided by the system is 10/16~10/19 (which may coincide with the Mainland China National Day holiday).
translations.組合時可先安裝上半部錶帶，再拉掉紙質保護套，比較不容易手滑。\n\n: When assembling, you can first attach the upper half of the band, then remove the paper protective cover to reduce the chance of slipping.
translations.綜合以上狀況 Apple Watch 就能在其中充當潤滑劑，在人與手機之間多加了: Considering the above situations, the Apple Watch acts as a lubricant, adding a filter funnel between the user and the phone. When wearing the watch and the phone is asleep, only the watch will notify. You can set notifications from specific apps to appear on the watch and disable sound/vibration for certain apps.
translations.考量到之前買 LTE 都沒用這次改買 GPS 版了，便宜 $ 3000。\n\n: Considering I never used LTE before, I chose the GPS version this time, saving $3000.
translations.詳細比較可參考官網「 [比較所有錶款](https://www.apple.co: For a detailed comparison, please refer to the official website "[Compare All Models](https://www.apple.com/tw/watch/compare/){:target="_blank"}". There are also some differences in features, such as the altimeter, compass, and more.
translations.說實話需要複雜操作的時候你會用手機，手錶真的只需要快速而已。\n\n: To be honest, for complex tasks, you'll use your phone. The watch is really just for quick actions.
translations.透過有 Apple Watch 才能使用的獨佔的「健身」APP，能記錄你一天的生: The exclusive "Fitness" app, only available with Apple Watch, can track your daily life, including daily activity, walking, heart rate, and workout records. It also provides activity trends and more detailed health information. On the social side, you can compete with friends on activity levels and unlock badges to boost motivation.
translations.這一代包裝厚度明顯減少許多（少了豆腐頭）\n\n: The packaging thickness is noticeably reduced this generation (no more bulky charger).
translations.這次機體的保護材質改為紙製的，上一代我記得是黑色的絨布。\n\n: This time, the protective material is changed to paper; I remember the previous generation used black velvet.
translations.這次選擇 GPS 44'mm 鋁合金版賽普樂絲綠（軍綠），搭配我的 iPhone: This time, I chose the GPS 44mm aluminum model in Cypress Green (military green), matching my iPhone 11 Pro in military green.
translations.這部分我因為把原本 Series 4 手錶讓給家人有實際體驗過，可 [參考此開箱: I have actual experience because I gave my original Series 4 watch to a family member. You can [refer to this unboxing video](https://youtu.be/DMXGSGJDc8c?t=509){:target="_blank"}. This feature ties the watch to your phone, and the watch must be nearby to change settings. After completing the setup process, some settings cannot be adjusted again without resetting. The shared family member can only use the watch and cannot customize it themselves.
translations.鋁合金版二手市場需求較多，新一代出來比較好脫手（我的 Series 4 還能賣到: The aluminum version has higher demand in the second-hand market. The newer generation is easier to sell (my Series 4 can still fetch around 7,000 to 8,000).
translations.鋁合金版的機身跟玻璃都較脆弱、螢幕玻璃也不抗刮，建議再多買保護殼+貼滿版保護貼。: The aluminum case and glass are more fragile, and the screen glass is not scratch-resistant. It is recommended to buy a protective case and a full-coverage screen protector.
translations.錶面、錶帶都能隨時依照你的心情更換；錶面固定了幾個，幾個上班用、幾個放假用；錶帶: You can change the watch face and band anytime to match your mood; I have a few watch faces set—some for workdays, some for days off. Over the past two years, I've bought four bands: leather, metal, woven, plus different colors of protective cases to match my outfits.
translations.開箱全過程完全用不到刀子，一路撕到底。\n\n: The entire unboxing process requires no knife, just peel it all the way.
translations.隨顯螢幕休眠 vs 顯示時\n\n: Always-On Display Sleep vs Active Display
translations.雖然你大可以關閉聲音通知、關閉靜音時震動、甚至關閉所有通知功能；但另一方面你也因: Although you can turn off sound notifications, disable vibrations in silent mode, or even turn off all notifications, on the other hand, you disconnect from the world and miss truly important alerts, leading to a different kind of anxiety where you constantly check your phone.
translations.騎機車時蠻好用的，可以 **直接查看路線地圖** 、路線/轉彎震動提示；但缺點就: It's quite useful when riding a scooter, allowing you to **view the route map directly** and get route/turn vibration alerts. However, the downside is that the map is not optimized for scooters, so you need to **watch out for scooter-restricted routes**. The route planning capability is average.
